campaign_notFoundBody: We couldn't locate this campaign. It may have been deleted or the name is incorrect.
campaign_reportsPlaceholder: Sentiment reports will appear here once ingestion runs.

match.minLen=*: Topic must be at least {minLen} characters
match.minLen=1: Topic must be at least 1 character

create_errorNetwork: Network error — please check your connection.
create_errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
create_nameHint: Up to {max} characters. Letters and underscores only.
create_subtitle: Pick a name, list the topics you want to track, and set the date range.
create_topicPlaceholder: Type a topic and press Enter...
create_topicsHint: Press Enter or comma to add a topic. Up to {max}, {minLen}-{maxLen} characters each.

match.code=*: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
match.code=404: We couldn't find the page you were looking for. It may have been moved or never existed.
match.code=500: Our servers tripped over a wire. The team has been notified — try again in a moment.

home_subtitle: Create a campaign, define the topics you want to monitor, and Marky finds relevant Bluesky posts to generate reports with sentiment, key conversations and representative comments.
list_emptyBody: Campaigns let you track topics over time and measure sentiment across prediction markets.
list_emptyLead: No campaigns yet - kick one off to start tracking sentiment.
login_confirmSubtitle: Check your email for a verification code.
login_errorExpiredCode: Code expired. Please request a new one.
login_errorNetwork: Network error — please check your connection.
login_errorNotConfirmed: Account not confirmed. Please check your email.
login_errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
login_errorUserExists: An account with this email already exists.
login_errorWeakPassword: Password too weak. Use 8+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers.
login_footer: By signing in you agree to track sentiment responsibly.
login_switchToSignin: Already have an account? Sign in
login_switchToSignup: Don't have an account? Sign up
reset_codeSubtitle: Enter the code from your email and choose a new password.
reset_errorExpiredCode: Code expired. Please request a new one.
reset_subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a code to reset your password.
reset_success: Password reset successfully. Please sign in.
